arts.ttl: Preview: Bristol City vs. Sunderland - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Friday's Championship clash between Bristol City and Sunderland, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss responds to Rob Atkinson transfer question as Bristol City promotion mooted
arts.sum: Portsmouth manager John Mousinho has honestly admitted he doesn't know if Bristol City being promoted to the Premier League would change his side's ability to bring Rob Atkinson back to Fratton Park during the summer transfer window. Rob Atkinson left Bristol City on loan during the January transfer window, joining Portsmouth for the remainder of the season
